case_title: TAMANIEKA FIELDS et al VS. CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIELDS, TAMANIEKA FIELDS, PETE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY EXCEPT PLAINTIFF PETE FIELDS. APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS, EXCEPT DEFENDANT DEBORAH MADARIS. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY PATRICE COPELAND--DIRECTOR OF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2013 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FIELDS, TAMANIEKA FIELDS, PETE AS TO DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION KIZINE, JO ANN (MANAGER) MADARIS, DEBROAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIELDS, TAMANIEKA FIELDS, PETE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION KIZINE, JO ANN (MANAGER) MADARIS, DEBROAH CORRECT SPELLING FOR DEFENDANT "DEBORAH MCDURRIS" IS DEBORAH MADARIS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
